data.title: Arthur J. Gallagher acquires Sheila J. Butler & Company
data.description:
• Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) said it has acquired Georgia-based Sheila J. Butler & Company.
  • The terms of the deal were not disclosed.
  • Sheila J. Butler & Company is an employee benefits brokerage firm.
  • Sheila J. Butler, Blake Butler and their team will remain in their current location, the company said.

data.title: Helix Biopharma appoints James Murphy as CFO
data.description:
• Helix BioPharma (OTCPK:HBPCF) on Wednesday announced the appointment of James Murphy as Chief Financial Officer.
  • Murphy is currently a consultant with Danforth Advisors. 
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Digital Brands announces 1-for-50 reverse stock split
data.description:
• Digital Brands Group (NASDAQ:DBGI) on Wednesday said it will effectuate a 1-for-50 reverse split of its common stock that will become effective on December 13.
  • The company expects that the reverse stock split will allow it to regain compliance with the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement of the Nasdaq Capital Market.
  • DBG’s common stock will continue to trade on Nasdaq under the symbol “DBGI” and will begin trading on a split-adjusted basis when the market opens on December 13.
  • DBGI -21.95% premarket to $0.08.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Gouverneur Bancorp approves share buyback program
data.description:
• Gouverneur Bancorp (OTCQB:GOVB) said its board has approved a stock repurchase program authorizing the repurchase of up to 55.4K shares.
  • Press Release

data.title: Hepion Pharmaceuticals announces termination of merger agreement with Pharma Two B
data.description:
• Hepion Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:HEPA) on Wednesday said it has entered into a termination agreement with Pharma Two B, which terminates the merger agreement between the two parties that was entered into in July.
  • HEPA -22.23% premarket to $0.4899.
  • Earlier in July, Pharma Two B has entered into a merger agreement with Hepion Pharmaceuticals.
  • Neither party will be required to pay the other a termination fee as a result of the mutual decision to terminate the agreement.
  • The drug developer also announced that its special meeting of its stockholders scheduled for December 12, 2024 has been cancelled.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: GreenPower receives follow-on order from Transportation Commodities for 10 EV star cab & chassis
data.description:
• GreenPower Motor (NASDAQ:GP) on Wednesday announced that it has received a follow-on order for 10 EV Star Cab & Chassis from Transportation Commodities.
  • GP +0.06% premarket to $0.9.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: CPI read: Prices on sporting goods are in a downtrend ahead of the holidays
data.description:
Prices on sporting goods products in the U.S. fell 2.8% year-over-year in November compared to a year ago on an unadjusted basis. Overall, core inflation was up 3.3% year-over-year during the month, which was level with the pace in September.

On a month-to-month comparison, sporting good prices were down 0.3% in November after falling 0.5% in both October, according to data compiled by the Bureau of Transportation Statistics. Airfares have now decreased in four of the last five months.

The sporting goods category in the Consumer Price Index report encompasses a wide range of equipment and apparel related to sports and recreational activities.

The lower level of prices may not be an indication that demand has fallen off dramatically, based on recent commentary from Dick's Sporting Goods (NYSE:DKS) management.

Sports-related stocks: Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS), Academy Sports and Outdoors (NASDAQ:ASO), Hibbett, Big 5 Sporting Goods (BGFV) ,Amer Sports (AS), Topgolf Callaway Brands (MODG), Nike (NYSE:NKE), Under Armour (UAA),

data.title: NanoVibronix renews distribution agreement with Ultra Pain Products
data.description:
• NanoVibronix (NASDAQ:NAOV) said it has renewed its exclusive distribution agreement with Ultra Pain Products for the distribution of the firm's PainShield for another five years.
  • "The company’s decision to renew the distribution agreement comes in recognition of UPPI’s remarkable growth over the past four years and its evolution into a leading force in the non-opioid pain management and injury recovery industry," the company said.
  • Shares +8.5% in premarket trade.

data.title: AquaBounty announces plans to cease fish farming operations
data.description:
• AquaBounty Technologies (NASDAQ:AQB) on Wednesday said it will wind down its hatchery operations in Bay Fortune, including a reduction of its workforce and the exit of several senior management members.
  • Dave Melbourne, the company's Chief Executive Officer, has voluntarily resigned his position with the company, effective December 6, 2024.
  • Additionally, Alejandro Rojas and Melissa Daley, its Chief Operating Officer and Chief People Officer, respectively, have departed with the elimination of their positions.
  • AQB -6.2% premarket to $0.8709.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: VivoPower regains Nasdaq compliance
data.description:
• VivoPower International (NASDAQ:VVPR) on Wednesday said it received a Nasdaq letter, indicating that the company regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement rule of $1.00 per share for continued listing.
  • VVPR -1.65% premarket to $1.19.
  • Source: Press Release
